models.alreadyDefault: This is already the selected OpenCode default.

models.routeUnavailableFailed: This model route failed its last execution test.
models.routeUnavailableGeneric: This model route cannot be used right now.
models.routeUnavailableUnknown: This model is the current OpenCode default, but it is not available in the live catalog yet.

allTasksCompleted.description: Notify when every task in a team reaches completed status

about.description: Assemble AI agent teams that work autonomously in parallel, communicate across teams, and manage tasks on a kanban board - with built-in code review, live process monitoring, and full tool visibility.

anthropic.name: Anthropic API Key
anthropic.title: API key
anthropic.description: Use a direct Anthropic API key for API-billed access. Your Anthropic subscription session stays available when you switch back.

codex.name: Codex API Key
codex.title: API key
codex.description: Use an OpenAI API key as a secondary Codex auth path. If you switch Codex to API key mode, the app will mirror OPENAI_API_KEY into CODEX_API_KEY for native launches.

gemini.name: Gemini API Key
gemini.title: API access
gemini.description: Use `GEMINI_API_KEY` for the Gemini API backend. CLI SDK and ADC do not require it.

account.description: Manage the local Codex app-server account session that powers subscription-backed native launches.
account.title: ChatGPT account

hints.autoUsesApiKeyUntilChatgpt: {{message}} Auto will keep using the detected API key until ChatGPT is connected.
hints.detectedApiKeyNeedsApiMode: {{message}} The detected API key is only used after you switch Codex to API key mode.
hints.localArtifactsNoSession: Codex CLI currently reports no active ChatGPT account. Local Codex account data exists, but no active managed session is selected. Usage limits appear here only after Codex CLI sees one.
hints.noActiveAccount: Codex CLI currently reports no active ChatGPT account. Usage limits appear here only after Codex CLI sees one.
hints.reconnectBeforeUsage: Codex has a locally selected ChatGPT account, but the current session needs reconnect before usage limits can load here.
hints.usageLimitsAfterReport: Usage limits appear here after Codex reports them for the connected ChatGPT account.

install.title: Install Codex CLI into app data

rateLimits.creditsDescription: Credits are shown separately from window-based subscription usage and may be unavailable for plan-backed ChatGPT sessions.
rateLimits.noSecondaryWindow: Codex did not return a secondary window for this account snapshot.
rateLimits.usedQuotaNote: These percentages show used quota, not remaining quota.
rateLimits.secondaryWindowNote: Weekly limits are shown separately in the {{window}} window.
rateLimits.usageExplanationGeneric: Shows used quota, not remaining quota.
rateLimits.usageExplanationWindowOnly: Shows used quota in the current {{window}} window, not remaining quota.
rateLimits.usageExplanationWithRemaining: {{used}} used - about {{remaining}} left in the current {{window}} window.

compatibleEndpoint.keepSavedToken: Leave blank to keep saved token
compatibleEndpoint.title: Local / compatible endpoint

validation.firstPartyAnthropic: Use Auto, Subscription, or API key for first-party Anthropic
validation.httpRequired: Base URL must use http:// or https://
validation.noCredentials: Base URL must not include credentials

status.endpointDisabledTokenKept: Endpoint disabled. Saved token was kept.
status.endpointSavedTokenMissing: Endpoint saved. Auth token is not configured.

descriptions.anthropic: Choose how app-launched Anthropic sessions authenticate.
descriptions.codex: Choose whether Codex should prefer your ChatGPT subscription or an API key when the native runtime launches.
descriptions.gemini: Configure optional API access. CLI SDK and ADC are still discovered automatically.
descriptions.opencode: OpenCode authentication and provider inventory are managed by the OpenCode runtime.

anthropic.apiKeyDescription: Use ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and Anthropic API billing.
anthropic.autoDescription: Use Anthropic runtime defaults and the best local credential available.
anthropic.hint: Auto keeps Anthropic on its default local credential resolution.
anthropic.subscriptionDescription: Use your local Anthropic sign-in session and subscription access.

codex.apiKeyDescription: Use OPENAI_API_KEY and CODEX_API_KEY billing for native Codex launches.
codex.autoDescription: Prefer your ChatGPT account and subscription. Use API key mode only if needed.
codex.chatgptDescription: Use your connected ChatGPT account and Codex subscription.
codex.hint: Codex always runs through the native runtime. Auto prefers your ChatGPT account before falling back to API-key credentials.

providerRuntime.description: Manage how each provider connects and, when supported, which backend the multimodel runtime should use.

fastMode.description: Apply Claude Code Fast mode by default for new Anthropic team launches when the resolved model and runtime allow it.
fastMode.disabledHint: New Anthropic launches stay on normal speed unless a team explicitly enables Fast mode.
fastMode.enabledHint: New Anthropic launches will request Fast mode by default when the resolved model supports it.
fastMode.notExposed: This Anthropic runtime does not expose Fast mode.
fastMode.title: Fast mode default
fastMode.unavailableForRuntime: Fast mode is currently unavailable for this Anthropic runtime.

alerts.anthropicApiKeyMissing: API key mode is selected, but no Anthropic API credential is available yet.
alerts.anthropicStoredKeyAvailable: A saved API key is available, but app-launched Anthropic sessions use it only after you switch to API key mode.
alerts.anthropicSubscriptionMissing: Anthropic subscription mode is selected. Sign in with Anthropic to use this provider.
alerts.authTokenMissing: Auth token is not configured. Many local Anthropic-compatible endpoints require a non-empty token.
alerts.chatgptLoginPending: Waiting for ChatGPT account login to finish...
alerts.codexApiKeyMissing: API key mode is selected, but no OPENAI_API_KEY or CODEX_API_KEY credential is available yet.
alerts.codexLocalArtifactsNoSession: Codex CLI currently has no active ChatGPT account. Local Codex account data exists, but no active managed session is selected.
alerts.codexNeedsReconnect: Codex has a locally selected ChatGPT account, but the current session needs reconnect.
alerts.codexNoChatgptAccount: Codex CLI currently has no active ChatGPT account. Connect ChatGPT to use your subscription.
alerts.codexNoCredential: No ChatGPT account or API key is available yet.
alerts.geminiApiUnavailable: Gemini API is currently unavailable. Configure `GEMINI_API_KEY` here or use valid Google ADC credentials.
alerts.withApiKeyFallback: {{message}} Switch to API key mode to use the detected API key.

anthropic.apiKey: Force app-launched Anthropic sessions to use an API key credential.
anthropic.auto: Use the runtime default behavior. Saved API keys in this app are only used after you switch to API key mode.
anthropic.oauth: Force app-launched Anthropic sessions to use the local Anthropic subscription session.

codex.apiKey: Force native Codex launches to use OPENAI_API_KEY / CODEX_API_KEY billing.
codex.auto: Prefer your ChatGPT account when it is available. Fall back to API key mode only when needed.
codex.chatgpt: Force native Codex launches to use your connected ChatGPT account and subscription.

descriptions.anthropic: Anthropic currently has no separate runtime backend selector.
descriptions.codex: Codex now runs only through the native runtime path.
descriptions.gemini: Choose which Gemini runtime backend multimodel should use.
descriptions.opencode: OpenCode uses its own managed runtime host. Desktop currently exposes status only.

disconnect.anthropic: This removes the local Anthropic subscription session from the Claude CLI runtime.
disconnect.anthropicWithApiKey: This removes the local Anthropic subscription session from the Claude CLI runtime. Saved API keys in Manage stay available.
disconnect.gemini: This clears the local Gemini CLI session metadata. External ADC credentials and saved API keys are not removed.
